title: 河流该是直的还是弯的？

svg.good: <rect width="600" height="200" fill="url(#mountSky)"/><rect y="180" width="600" height="220" fill="url(#field)"/><path d="M 250 400 C 330 330 200 300 300 250 C 400 200 270 180 330 130" stroke="#9fb8c8" stroke-width="30" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 250 400 C 330 330 200 300 300 250 C 400 200 270 180 330 130" stroke="#c4d6e0" stroke-width="12" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>${grain}
svg.bad: <rect width="600" height="200" fill="url(#mountSky)"/><rect y="180" width="600" height="220" fill="url(#field)"/><path d="M 290 400 L 320 130" stroke="#9fb8c8" stroke-width="30" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 290 400 L 320 130" stroke="#c4d6e0" stroke-width="12" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>${grain}

verdict: 更优雅的是河流呈 S 形蜿蜒的一张。
points: S 形曲线像一条缎带,引着视线舒缓地绕向深处,既有引导又有柔美的韵律。
笔直一条则生硬、急促,少了那份从容和回转的余味。

soft.label: 并非定律
soft.text: 笔直的线条传达力量与速度;S 形传达柔和与优雅——看你要刚还是柔。
